title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Colosseum Fighters, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13 as luffy’s Colosseum path becomes personal when Don Chinjao recognizes his connection to Garp and attacks him with old resentment.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So I hear you're gunning for that "Lucy" guy, Cavendish

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: ...Barto- Lomeo, isn't it... Congratulations on your victory

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As for Lucy... that has nothing to do with you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No... that man ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I won't let you kill him

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Fufu... Really NOW? You too ...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's really the man of the hour...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hehaha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I think my motivations run deeper ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We've already got contestants being defeated, one after the other!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: This C-block is a white-hot battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But even in the fights among the strongest contenders...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's one giant warrior who literally stands above all others!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's HUGE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's one of the "new generation" of Warriors from the kingdom of giants, Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Have you ever seen a giant with a Logia ability?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He also holds the title of the strongest pirate Mercury....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Uwah hhhh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hajrudin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Because that's what I'll be...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Once I eat the Mera- Mera!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And I'll become the King of all Giants!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Uwah hhhh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Each punch is like a bolt of lightning!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: gyahhhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Can anyone stop this guy!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: and on the other side!! showing no fear in the face of a number of ferocious opponents

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The fighting bull is proving itself with an impressive rampage!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Here at our co- Lossem, death row prisoners meet their end in matches with...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This man- killing bull, who's already sent 21 men to hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: MOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: He's called the Colosseum's death God!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "Brutal bull"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But how is it that this man knows how to ride such a death god!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: KYAH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wahaha hahaha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What's that guy! Doing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He's appeared like a shining star and become a fan favorite in a flash thanks to his light and nimble strength!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's Lucy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uooh Hhhhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: MOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And I like him too, this guy!! Gyahaha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gats-san, you've got to report without bias!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lucy

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
